violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Case of bread on floor of unit. - Food and paper goods/single use items must be stored 6" above the floor.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Wet wiping cloth solution: - water was dirty and must be replaced. Try to change every 2 hours or when visibly soiled. Wiping cloth solution for wiping cloths exceeds 400 ppm. - Directions require 150-400 ppm concentration.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Thawing crab in standing water, water at 58 F. - Thaw under refrigeration.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Interior of unit filled with smoke, electric griddle. - An ehaust hood or sidwall fan must be added.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Cases of disposable gloves on the floor of the unit. Must be stored above the floor.
Food display and service. — --Crab thawing in sink, water at 58 F. Product about 50 F. Refrigerate immedaitely to 41 F.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
